MFP-01.notes: KeysModal.tsx:174 undefined `color:GOLD` replaced with var(--syn-accent-gold, #f5b301) (single repo-wide occurrence, nothing to import-restore). Gate general green: typecheck + lint:errors clean. Added render-smoke test KeysModal.smoke.test.tsx (1 passed). Branch claude/modal-fix-p1-0r2g87.

MFP-02.notes: Promoted canonical focus trap to src/hooks/useFocusTrap.ts (verbatim; exports FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR, getFocusableElements, useFocusTrap); reduced src/centerpanel/components/map/useFocusTrap.ts to `export * from '@/hooks/useFocusTrap';`. Pure move + re-export, no behavioural change. Gate gis: typecheck clean, 932 unit tests pass (map-accessibility unchanged + new src/hooks trap test), lint:errors clean; lint:no-tailwind-centerpanel not runnable (PowerShell absent on Linux runner) — manually verified the touched centerpanel file has no class/className literal. Unblocks MFP-06/MFP-13.

MFP-03.notes: Added src/hooks/useScrollLock.ts — module-level ref-counted body-scroll lock; first lock saves prior overflow + sets 'hidden', last release restores the saved value (not 'unset'); SSR-safe. Fixes M5 (stacked modals fighting body scroll). Modal.tsx untouched (wiring is MFP-06). Gate general: typecheck clean, vitest src/hooks = 5 passed, lint:errors clean.

MFP-04.notes: Added src/hooks/useInertBackground.ts — generalizes MapWorkspaceShell sibling-exclusion; while active sets inert + aria-hidden on body-level siblings, excluding self branch + modal/portal root + data-map-overlay-root; snapshots/restores prior state (nested-safe); SSR-safe; inert via setAttribute (no any). Fixes M6. Modal.tsx untouched (MFP-06 wires it). Gate general: typecheck clean, vitest src/hooks = 8 passed, lint:errors clean.

MFP-05.notes: Published z-index CSS vars: design.ts zIndex gains systemBanner:10090 (above toast); theme.ts createCSSVariables publishes --z-system-banner and --z-statusbar (statusBar tier was defined but unexposed). Single source of truth = design.ts; no literals in theme.ts; no consumer migrated (MFP-15 does that). Gate general: typecheck clean, color:guard clean, new zIndexTokens drift test = 2 passed, lint:errors clean. Unblocks MFP-15.

MFP-06.notes: Rebuilt base molecules Modal on MFP-02/03/04/05 hooks: useFocusTrap (trap+restore via layout move-in + post-uninert restore effect), useId title id, dialog-scoped Escape + backdrop-only overlay click (dropped global useKeyPress/useOnClickOutside), useScrollLock, useInertBackground, aria-live status, SYNAPSE_OVERLAY.surface palette, min-width:min(640px,100%) reflow, prefers-reduced-motion. New optional ariaLabel/describedby; no any. Gate general: typecheck + lint:errors clean. Modal.a11y.test.tsx = 6/6. Full vitest 3085 passed; the 3 failures (useMapExplorerStore persistence x2, MapExplorerModal.dispatch x1) are PRE-EXISTING on master (verified by running with master's Modal.tsx) — not caused by MFP-06. PROOF CAVEAT: e2e-a11y environment-blocked (Playwright browser download denied by sandbox; dev server not bootable) — substituted by jsdom a11y suite + manual-keyboard.md; re-run npm run test:e2e:a11y in a browser-capable env for the full Map Explorer audit. Unblocks MFP-07/10/11/12/14/16/20.

MFP-07.notes: Foundation tests: new src/test/assertDialogA11y.ts (reusable contract: focus-in, Tab/Shift+Tab wrap, restore, Escape — reused by MFP-20); new Modal.test.tsx (assertDialogA11y + unique useId title ids + ariaLabel/describedby wiring); expanded useFocusTrap.test.ts (capture/restore + document.contains guard + wrap). useScrollLock/useInertBackground tests already cover ref-counting + inert toggling from MFP-03/04. No any (typed WritableRef). Validation: vitest src/components/molecules src/hooks = 5 files / 21 passed; typecheck + lint:errors clean.

MFP-08.notes: AiSettingsModal made conformant (AS1-AS7): createPortal to body; useFocusTrap(open)+activate (trap/restore/focus-in); dialog-scoped Escape; useId aria-labelledby; close button aria-label; z-index var(--z-modal); removed all 4 any (ProviderKey/BuildParams + optional chaining). Also WCAG 1.4.3: label/hint fallback --syn-text-muted -> --syn-text-secondary (--ai-fg-secondary undefined repo-wide so labels really failed AA 4.17:1; css-module-only, color:guard-safe); preview <pre> made focusable. Gate general: typecheck clean (no any) + lint:errors clean. AiSettingsModal.a11y.test.tsx 5/5. REAL-CHROMIUM PROOF (Playwright via /opt/pw-browsers chromium-1194 + Vite harness): axe-core on open dialog = 0 violations (before: 2 serious - 11 color-contrast + 1 scrollable-region); before.png/after.png screenshots captured. Unblocks MFP-20 (a11y test reused).

MFP-09.notes: MapServiceDialog conformant: useFocusTrap(open) on overlay + activate (trap/focus-in/restore); dialog-scoped Escape (stopPropagation); layer list role=listbox->group (children stay toggle buttons, drops invalid listbox+button+aria-pressed); renamed module boundsLabel->formatBoundsLabel (removes prop shadow); fetch catches route through reportError(source:adapter). No Tailwind/any; data-testid preserved. Gate gis: typecheck + lint:errors clean; vitest src/centerpanel/components/map = 98 files/933 passed (map-accessibility unchanged + new MapServiceDialog.a11y.test.tsx 3/3); lint:no-tailwind-centerpanel PowerShell-only (env-blocked) manually verified. REAL-CHROMIUM axe excluding pre-existing color-contrast = 0 violations; after.png screenshot. CAVEAT: full axe has 8 color-contrast residuals from SHARED map tokens (#778190/#3794ff, Map-Explorer-wide) - out of MFP-09 scope (keyboard/roles), recommend dedicated map-contrast pass.

MFP-10.notes: NewFileModal NF1-NF5: dialog role/aria moved to panel (overlay role=presentation); category/language/template are role=radiogroup of real <button role=radio aria-checked> (keyboard-operable); useFocusTrap+useScrollLock replace hand-rolled Escape/body-scroll, activate() focus-in, dialog-scoped Escape, filename rAF autofocus preserved; static data extracted to newFileTemplates.ts (metadata, static) + newFileTemplateContent.ts (heavy map, lazy import on create -> own ~16.8kB chunk, no ineffective-import warning), 940->553 lines; dead inline pseudo-selectors removed -> NewFileModal.module.css; no any. Gate general: typecheck+lint clean; perf:budgets passed; build OK; NewFileModal.a11y.test.tsx 4/4. REAL-CHROMIUM axe on open dialog = 0 violations (before: 1 serious scrollable-region); before/after screenshots.

MFP-11.notes: NewProjectModal template chooser: TemplateGrid role=radiogroup (aria-label=Project template); each TemplateCard role=radio + aria-checked + aria-label + aria-describedby + roving tabIndex (0 selected/-1 others); onKeyDown Enter/Space select + Arrow keys roving (ref-array focus); isCreating guards both paths; visual styling unchanged; dialog shell owned by base Modal (MFP-06); no any. Gate general: typecheck + lint:errors clean; NewProjectModal.test.tsx 4/4. REAL-CHROMIUM axe on open dialog = 0 violations (before also 0 — axe can't detect mouse-only div keyboard gap; fix proven by tests; passes 15->16); before/after screenshots.
